string: Family Desk uses your microphone so you can speak to create tasks, chat with the assistant, and use voice commands hands-free.
Family Desk converts your voice into text on-device so you can dictate tasks, notes, and chat messages.
Family Desk uses your camera to take profile photos for you, your household, and family members.
Family Desk needs access to your photos so you can choose existing pictures for profile, household, and family member avatars.
Family Desk may save photos you capture back to your library.
Family Desk sends reminders for tasks, habits, meal prep, and pantry alerts to keep your household running smoothly.
